candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue row; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue row with identical values; useful as fallback label across periods.
Contains the word revenue but is clearly not top-line sales.
Not revenue/sales; balance sheet liability.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Explicit standard COGS label matching direct costs.
Also appears to represent total production/direct costs, but the explicit COGS label is preferred.
Only a component of production costs, not full COGS.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total COGS line rather than component rows.

candidates.why: Separate operating R&D expense above EBIT; should be included in XSGA when SG&A buckets selected do not already include R&D, so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Clear overhead/SG&A component.
Subcomponent of administrative expenses; subtotal row is preferred instead of underlying detail when no single SG&A line exists.
Subcomponent of administrative expenses.

variables.notes: R:nc. Candidate list appears to miss the important selling overhead row 'Distribution costs', which is present in the income statement and is a core SG&A component above EBIT. Selected subtotal-level overhead buckets (R&D costs, Administrative expenses, Distribution costs) and avoided underlying labor/other/depreciation subcomponents to prevent double counting. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Distribution costs

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above EBIT; best match.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Research & Development
candidates.why: Only a subcomponent of total R&D.
Only a subcomponent of total R&D.
Only D&A component of R&D, not total R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists above EBIT and is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD excludes R&D as intended.

candidates.row_label: Interest on bank debt, mortgages etc
candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense on borrowings.
Recurring financing cost; include alongside debt interest.
Broader total includes non-interest items like FX losses and transaction costs; less preferred than granular interest rows.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-interest amount; not needed when primary line exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest on cash and bank deposits
candidates.why: Interest income, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest on receivables, customer loans etc.
candidates.why: Interest income, not expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest on bank debt, mortgages etc

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest expense components and excluded broader 'Financial expenses' because it includes FX and other non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to Demant A/S shareholders
candidates.why: Preferred parent/owners' equity line, excluding non-controlling interests.
Total equity includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred.
This is minority interest, not parent book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to Demant A/S shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Explicit non-controlling interest line on balance sheet; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent label; useful as fallback.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet minority equity labels as a priority list.
